full_text:
#Taiwan’s🇹🇼 health care system has been ranked No. 1 in the world in Numbeo’s 2026 Health Care Index for the 8th year in a row. With accessible, high-quality care & near-universal coverage, Taiwan continues to show how our system delivers.
▶️ https://t.co/vQHi6hoIGp https://t.co/HfIDVc46Bw

We welcome @ChinaSelect’s continued support for Taiwan. Standing together strengthens deterrence, deepens #Taiwan🇹🇼–#US🇺🇸 ties & helps safeguard peace & prosperity across the Taiwan Strait & the Indo-Pacific.

We appreciate @SenateForeign's continued support for #Taiwan’s🇹🇼 self-defense. The PRC’s military exercises around Taiwan only underscore why preparedness & deterrence are essential to preserving peace & prosperity in the Taiwan Strait & Indo-Pacific.

FM Lin Chia-lung welcomes U.S. 🇺🇸 concern over PRC actions, including PLA provocations around #Taiwan🇹🇼, that threaten the status quo, maritime security & freedom of navigation. Taiwan stands firmly with allies & partners to safeguard a free & open Indo-Pacific. https://t.co/gPDn3C6Nnm

Taiwan extends deepest condolences to the victims and families affected by the tragic explosion in Crans-Montana, Switzerland. We wish a speedy recovery to the injured and stand in solidarity with the Swiss people at this difficult time. 🇹🇼🇨🇭
RT @ChingteLai: In 2025, #TeamTaiwan proved what unity makes possible, from economic growth at a 15-year high to the launch of our 1st Taiw…

Despite the challenges 2026 may bring, MOFA will continue to focus on strengthening friendships with allies & like-minded partners in the new year, towards a new era of common prosperity, in which Taiwan can shine on the world stage!
MOFA wishes you a #HappyNewYear! https://t.co/IjzwM2R6At

✈️ 2025 Wrapped｜In a challenging year, Taiwan kept moving forward—boosting tech, industry & cultural ties with partners. Minister Lin Chia-lung shows how our shared values of democracy, peace & prosperity connect Taiwan to the world. Thanks to all who stand with Taiwan. https://t.co/DxN32DfI9j

We thank the EU, the UK, France, Germany, Australia, New Zealand, Japan & others for statements of concern on PLA provocations around #Taiwan, which threaten the status quo. As a global stakeholder, we'll work towards regional peace & prosperity alongside like-minded countries. https://t.co/BxX2vYYg7Q
RT @ChingteLai: China’s military provocations along the First Island Chain severely disrupt global maritime trade, air traffic & regional p…

Bien dicho, señor vicepresidente. Nosotros también creemos en la importancia de la paz y la seguridad. Agradecemos la solidaridad de nuestro país hermano, el Paraguay, y nos unimos en la condena de las amenazas de la República Popular China.

Thank you for your concern about the possibility of a PLA blockade and PRC coercion of Taiwan. As a responsible regional stakeholder, we are eager to work with like-minded partners, like the US, to defend regional and global peace & stability.

We stand firm with the @MoNDefense & all front-line members of the armed forces responding to the PLA provocations around Taiwan. We condemn the CCP's threat to regional & global peace, stability &  prosperity & will meet it with preparedness, alongside our democratic partners.

Ring in 2026 with Taipei 101! 🎆
MOFA is offering a worldwide satellite feed of the iconic fireworks display starting at 11:55 PM (Taipei time) on Dec 31. This year features a first-ever collab with Taipei Music Center on an original soundtrack. 🎶🇹🇼
Watch https://t.co/ywNufvpxZ1 https://t.co/UTQIW0VtYM

Taiwán 🇹🇼 expresa sus más sinceras condolencias a las familias y seres queridos de las víctimas del trágico accidente de autobús en Guatemala 🇬🇹. Nuestros pensamientos están con los heridos y nos solidarizamos con el pueblo guatemalteco en este difícil momento.

During his recent visit to Palau, Minister @chia_lung prepared Christmas stocking gifts for children in our ally Palau. From everyone at MOFA and #Taiwan🇹🇼, we wish our friends around the world a joyful festive season filled with warmth and peace. 🎄✨ #MerryChristmas https://t.co/LqKblfoukW
Celebramos con orgullo 91 años de sólida amistad diplomática con Guatemala. Seguimos comprometidos a fortalecer y ampliar nuestra cooperación en los años por venir.

Minister @chia_lung thanks #US🇺🇸 President @realDonaldTrump for signing the FY2026 National Defense Authorization Act, which includes multiple provisions supportive of #Taiwan🇹🇼. We will continue deepening cooperation with the US to advance regional peace, stability & prosperity. https://t.co/pLabJl5Myf
RT @chia_lung: Met President @Surangeljr at Palau’s One Stop Shop, a symbol of #Taiwan–#Palau partnership. We reviewed ongoing cooperation…

Minister @chia_lung welcomes approval of arms sales totaling US$11.1B to #Taiwan🇹🇼, reaffirming the #US🇺🇸 commitment to our defense under the #TaiwanRelationsAct & #SixAssurances. This 2nd arms sale by @realDonaldTrump's current admin. strengthens our self-defense & deterrence. https://t.co/Vg4gd5onst

The #PRC’s ambitions go well beyond #Taiwan🇹🇼, Deputy Minister Chen cautions in his interview with @visegrad24. The rules-based international order, free markets & democratic governance itself are under threat—values Taiwan stands resolute in defending.

MOFA is seriously concerned by the PRC’s aggressive actions against Philippine vessels near the Sabina Shoal. The new tactic of cutting anchor lines endangers civilian safety & regional security. We urge the PRC to exercise restraint & comply with UNCLOS & international law. https://t.co/KCOIVGUlHI

#Taiwan🇹🇼 strongly condemns the antisemitic terrorist attack in #Australia🇦🇺 targeting a Hanukkah celebration. We mourn the victims & extend our deepest condolences to the injured, the Jewish community & the people of Australia. Hatred & violence have no place in any society.

.@CIVICUSMonitor's People Power Under Attack 2025 report shows civic space shrinking across Asia. #Taiwan🇹🇼 is one of only two countries in the region classified as open. People here can organize & express themselves without fear, proof that democracy delivers. (📷CIVICUS) https://t.co/jgAdUJJxun

Even outside the UN system, #Taiwan🇹🇼 voluntarily upholds CEDAW as domestic law. According to our latest CEDAW report, women now hold over 40% of seats in our legislature, the highest share in Asia. This is democracy turning values into reality. (📷EY) https://t.co/ZtSHo8BCFC

#Taiwan🇹🇼 Taoyuan Airport is ranked 9th on the 2025 SKYTRAX list of the world’s cleanest airports. We’re proud to be recognized for our high standards & hospitality. Friends from around the world: come experience Taiwan’s free, diverse & vibrant society! (📷SKYTRAX) https://t.co/fvDurK8e36

The PRC’s latest military maneuvers in the East China Sea & the wider region, are provocative and dangerous.  #Taiwan🇹🇼 is building our strength to deter aggression & works with like-minded partners in defending peace in the Indo-Pacific.

Thank you, Germany, for highlighting how deeply Asia & Europe are connected. Peace in the #TaiwanStrait safeguards global trade, stability & shared prosperity. #Taiwan🇹🇼 will keep reinforcing self-defense & standing with partners to protect a free & open Indo-Pacific.

Minister @chia_lung welcomes the reaffirmation of the importance of the Taiwan Strait to int'l security by #Japan🇯🇵 & #Australia's🇦🇺 defense ministers. With rising coercion from Beijing, #Taiwan🇹🇼 will strengthen defense & partner with democracies to safeguard Indo-Pacific peace. https://t.co/E0syCqInku

Taiwan provisions in the National Defense Authorization Act affirm strong US support for our security with a clear message from Congress: #Taiwan🇹🇼 is vital to regional security. We'll keep boosting self-defense & working with the #US🇺🇸 to show that peace comes from strength. https://t.co/1jO5iAttBJ

日本の青森県東方沖で昨夜11時15分ごろ、マグニチュード7.5の地震が発生しました。私たちの友人である日本の皆さまが無事であるよう心から祈っています。今後の余震による影響にも、くれぐれもご注意ください。
🇹🇼 ❤️ 🇯🇵 #AlwaysHere

#Taiwan’s🇹🇼 economy is set to grow 7.37% in 2025—our strongest in 15 years. As an innovation engine powered by AI & emerging tech, in Taiwan, we are ready to share our experience with the world & work with like-minded partners for a more resilient, prosperous future. https://t.co/CLze7PBdZG
RT @EBRD: Today we signed an LOI confirming the TaiwanBusiness–EBRD Technical Cooperation Fund’s support for our new work in Sub-Saharan Af…

We welcome President @realDonaldTrump's signing of the Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act, underscoring US support for Taiwan. By strengthening the implementation of the 2020 Act, this law helps ensure the steady growth of the #Taiwan🇹🇼–#US🇺🇸 partnership. https://t.co/WWyin0WVaX

Congratulations to @PhilipJPierreLC on his reelection as prime minister. #Taiwan🇹🇼 & #SaintLucia🇱🇨 have stood together like family since 2007 & we look forward to working with his government to deliver even greater progress for both our peoples in the years ahead. (📷SL Gov.) https://t.co/pxe2ok8Mc4

The @washingtonpost op-ed penned by @elyratner & @IIPS_org Chair Randy Schriver underscores that #Taiwan🇹🇼 is making major leaps in defense spending, expanding asymmetric capabilities & building national resilience. A stronger Taiwan makes for a more peaceful #TaiwanStrait.

Heartfelt congratulations to Dr. Godwin Friday as he assumes office as prime minister of St. Vincent & the Grenadines. #Taiwan🇹🇼 looks forward to deepening cooperation with #SVG🇻🇨, a cherished ally & member of our extended democratic family in the #Caribbean. 🤝 (📷NDPSVG) https://t.co/CQ5iIOFLKt

In an interview with @newshour’s @nickschifrin, Dep. Min. Chen said #Taiwan🇹🇼 is strengthening self-defense & deepening cooperation with the #US🇺🇸 & partners to deter aggression. He warned that the #PRC cannot peacefully coexist with democracies.

Watch🔽
https://t.co/vafRygEXWv

We are deeply saddened by the deadly floods & landslides in #Indonesia🇮🇩, #Malaysia🇲🇾, #SriLanka🇱🇰 & #Thailand🇹🇭. We offer sincere condolences to the victims & their families & pray for the speedy recovery of the injured & affected communities. #Taiwan🇹🇼 stands in solidarity.

🚀 Taiwan takes a major step into a new space era. The Formosat-8 “Chi Po-lin” satellite has lifted off, entered orbit & made first contact with the Svalbard station. It will soon begin high-resolution imaging to support planning, disaster response & national resilience. 🇹🇼✨ https://t.co/icgSYIKDXO

週末の優しさは、ちょっとしたことから始まります。たとえば小さなおすそ分けだったり。🐱✨

#台湾 からみなさんへ、ほっこり穏やかな週末を。🇹🇼💛🇯🇵

#AlwaysHere https://t.co/VqqwXBf5z7

We thank our US friends for recognizing #Taiwan🇹🇼’s commitment to self-defense. The US$40b special defense budget announced by President @ChingteLai boosts deterrence & helps secure #TaiwanStrait peace. We'll continue deepening cooperation under the TRA & Six Assurances. 🇹🇼🤝🇺🇸 https://t.co/5avtrts5Kx

RT @ChingteLai: 香港新界大埔昨晚發生重大火災，蔓延多棟住宅高樓。目前已有逾百人傷亡、仍有多人失蹤。所幸消防人員努力搶救，火勢已受到控制。

此時此刻，讓我們一起為香港祈福。我要為所有在災害中逝去的香港朋友、及其家屬致上最深的哀悼之意，並誠摯的慰問傷者，也希望能早…

Gracias, viceministro Pereira de @MDI_Paraguay, por su firme apoyo a #Taiwán🇹🇼 en @INTERPOL_HQ. Valoramos mucho su respaldo. Seguiremos trabajando junto a #Paraguay🇵🇾 y nuestros socios globales para combatir el crimen transnacional y proteger vidas.
RT @ChingteLai: No country is more determined in safeguarding #Taiwan’s future than our own. My @washingtonpost op-ed outlines how our unpr…

The #PRC's bullying & gray-zone coercion won’t shake #Taiwan’s🇹🇼 resolve to defend our freedom & prosperity. We’re strengthening our self-defense & whole-of-society resilience every day. Thank you @SenateForeign for standing with Taiwan as we protect peace in the #TaiwanStrait.

At #HFX2025, Dep. Min. Chen underscored how Taiwan is strengthening self-defense & whole-of-society resilience to safeguard #TaiwanStrait peace. He highlighted fast-growing #Taiwan🇹🇼–#Canada🇨🇦 ties in trade, tech & governance, & the security risks posed by autocratic regimes. https://t.co/OWeX7lUZs9

.@ChinaAmbUN distorts historical facts & misleads global opinion once again in his letter to @antonioguterres. The #UNCharter bars the threat or use of force in the #TaiwanStrait & we are a sovereign, democratic nation. Only #Taiwan's🇹🇼 elected gov't represents our 23M people.

Nous saluons la reconnaissance par le président @EmmanuelMacron de l’expertise de #Taiwan🇹🇼 en matière de lutte contre la désinformation. Nous continuerons de travailler avec la #France🇫🇷 et nos autres partenaires pour préserver la démocratie et protéger nos libertés.

We appreciate President @EmmanuelMacron’s recognition of #Taiwan’s🇹🇼 expertise in countering disinformation, a challenge for all democracies, along with foreign interference. We’ll keep working with #France🇫🇷 & like-minded partners to safeguard democracy & protect our freedoms.

仲のいい友人たちと寿司を食べに出かけ、そのあと日本のビールを飲みながらホタテをつまむなんて最高の週末でしょう？ 🇹🇼❤️🇯🇵
私たちの食卓はいつでも日本の味を歓迎します。
皆さんも素敵な週末をお過ごしください！ #AlwaysHere #DrinkResponsibly https://t.co/JS0c8wluaN

Vice Minister Ger joined Amb. Anjanette Kattil to celebrate 27 years of #Taiwan🇹🇼–#MarshallIslands🇲🇭 ties with a sweet treat for MOFA colleagues. Like family, we enjoy each other’s successes & support each other. Here’s to our mutual friendship for many years to come! 🍾🥂 https://t.co/dddStvrzZJ

Taiwan has fully lifted restrictions on foods from Japan’s five Fukushima-area prefectures. #Taiwan & #Japan are trusted partners, good friends & neighbors who support each other—always. 🇹🇼❤️🇯🇵 #AlwaysHere
台湾は、日本の福島を含む5県の食品に対する規制を全て撤廃しました。#台湾 と #日本 は互いに助け合う信頼できるパートナーであり、良き友人であり、隣人でもあります。🇹🇼❤️🇯🇵 #AlwaysHere

We appreciate the clear & unwavering US commitment to peace & stability in the Indo-Pacific. A stable Taiwan Strait is key to regional & global security and prosperity. #Taiwan🇹🇼 will continue working with the #US🇺🇸 & like-minded partners to uphold #IndoPacific security.

At the #BerlinSecurityConference, Dep. Minister Wu stressed that Indo-Pacific security & European peace are inseparable. #Taiwan🇹🇼 is determined to defend democracy, strengthen resilience & work with Europe to uphold stability, prosperity & the rules-based international order. https://t.co/P6cnDDKRUx

Our heartfelt thanks to our allies🇲🇭🇭🇹🇧🇿🇰🇳🇬🇹🇱🇨🇵🇾 who spoke up for Taiwan's #UNFCCC participation during #COP30. Climate knows no borders, so inclusive climate governance must leave no one behind. Taiwan will continue making positive contributions to global #ClimateAction. https://t.co/P9pjMEEL4B

We welcome the US Senate’s unanimous passage of the Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act. This bipartisan action further strengthens #Taiwan🇹🇼-#US🇺🇸 relations & underscores our shared commitment to freedom, prosperity & a free & open Indo-Pacific.

We thank the #US🇺🇸 & @SenateForeign for their longstanding support for peace & stability across the Taiwan Strait. Its stability is essential to global security & prosperity. #Taiwan🇹🇼 will continue working with like-minded partners to uphold regional peace.
RT @chia_lung: Honored to welcome #Tuvalu PM Feleti Teo and his wife to #Taiwan. His visit includes the signing of Taiwan-Tuvalu Kaitasi Tr…

Min. @chia_lung & spouse hosted PM @TerranceDrewSKN & spouse to lunch. We congratulate the PM on being named as a 2025 #MIPAD honoree & extend our best wishes as our ally #SaintKittsAndNevis🇰🇳 prepares to chair CARICOM in 2026! May our friendship endure for many years to come. https://t.co/tLUhQn3PKW

#Taiwan🇹🇼 ranks 1st in Asia & 7th globally in @FreedomHouse’s #FreedomOnTheNet 2025! As online freedoms shrink worldwide, Taiwan stands strong—protecting free expression, open information & a vibrant civic space. A clear reminder that democracy delivers. https://t.co/elYAOGgM6L

Dep. Min. Chen attended Belgium’s King’s Day👑 reception hosted by @m_branders, highlighting the steady growth of #Taiwan🇹🇼–#Belgium🇧🇪 ties. With shared democratic values & expanding cooperation in trade & tech, Taiwan looks forward to strengthening this like-minded partnership! https://t.co/5q3ouHyNDs

Minister @chia_lung welcomes the 1st arms sale by the current administration under @realDonaldTrump—US$330M in jet parts— reaffirming #US🇺🇸 commitments under the TRA & Six Assurances. #Taiwan🇹🇼 will continue strengthening its self-defense & #TaiwanStrait stability. https://t.co/tFPlNfwqkC

A warm welcome to Prime Minister @TerranceDrewSKN on his official visit to #Taiwan🇹🇼.
We look forward to deepening the friendship, cooperation & shared values between Taiwan & #SaintKittsAndNevis🇰🇳 built over 42 years.
Here’s to #SKNxTAIWAN!

The @G7 FMs reaffirmed the importance of #TaiwanStrait peace & stability, opposed unilateral changes to the status quo, & backed #Taiwan🇹🇼’s participation in int'l orgs. Taiwan will work with democracies & advance integrated diplomacy to promote regional peace & prosperity. https://t.co/JDxf03c0wW

We warmly welcome the #UK🇬🇧 as the newest full partner of #GCTF!
#Taiwan🇹🇼, together with the #US🇺🇸, #Japan🇯🇵, #Australia🇦🇺 & #Canada🇨🇦, will keep advancing global cooperation among like-minded democracies.
Here’s to 10 years of shared values & collective progress. 🌍 https://t.co/mVPf2s6IAD

As #COP30 unfolds in #Brazil🇧🇷, our allies have spoken up for #Taiwan🇹🇼’s inclusion in the #UNFCCC, praising our tech-driven role in the global green transition.
No one can tackle climate change alone, let’s #ChipInWithTaiwan for a sustainable, resilient future. 🎥 https://t.co/wbJtNxKXq9

We’re deeply grateful to our allies—🇸🇿🇵🇼🇲🇭🇰🇳🇹🇻—for championing #Taiwan🇹🇼’s inclusion at #COP30 in Brazil. Their voices at the Leaders Summit & Thematic Session remind the world that true #ClimateAction must leave no one behind. Together, we can build a more sustainable future. https://t.co/uTy42NwrYA

Standing up for fairness & inclusion! The #Lombardy Regional Council in #Italy🇮🇹 unanimously passed its first-ever pro-#Taiwan🇹🇼 resolution backing continued engagement with Taiwan & our participation in int'l organizations. Grazie, Lombardy, for standing with Taiwan! https://t.co/fj6RkVtnH7

#Taiwan🇹🇼 ranks 10th globally in the 2025 @IMD_Bschool World Digital Competitiveness Ranking! We’re #3 worldwide in future readiness, driven by innovation, agility & strong public-private collaboration. A future-ready digital democracy shaping global progress!
RT @chia_lung: A proud milestone! I’m honored to accompany VP @bikhim to Brussels for #IPAC2025 and witness her powerful speech highlightin…

Minister @chia_lung & Sports Minister Lee joined forces in sports diplomacy, showing how #Taiwan🇹🇼 combines int’l outreach & athletic excellence to connect with the world through #TeamTaiwan. We’re proud to work & play with fellow democracies on a global stage! https://t.co/0sAqCzR01S

VP @bikhim’s remarks at #IPACBrussels25 underscore our shared commitment to democracy & a rules-based order. Grateful to our friends in parliaments worldwide for standing with #Taiwan🇹🇼.
#StandTogether

Nous remercions @jnbarrot d’avoir réaffirmé l’opposition de la #France🇫🇷 à tout emploi de la force pr modifier le statu quo ds le #DétroitdeTaiwan. #Taiwan🇹🇼 & la France coopèrent étroitement & continueront à travailler ensemble pr maintenir paix & stabilité ds l'#IndoPacifique.

We thank FM @jnbarrot for reaffirming #France’s🇫🇷opposition to use of force to alter the #TaiwanStrait status quo. #Taiwan🇹🇼 & France enjoy close cooperation in energy, semiconductors & tech, & will keep working together to uphold peace & stability in the #IndoPacific. https://t.co/Fop3c5Kz9b

We’re deeply saddened by the loss of life & damage caused by Typhoon #Kalmaegi in the Philippines. #Taiwan🇹🇼 extends its heartfelt condolences to the victims & families affected & stands in solidarity with our friends in the #Philippines🇵🇭 during this difficult time.
RT @chia_lung: Honored to host permanent reps from the @UN, including Amb. Silk of the Marshall Islands, Amb. Scappini of Paraguay & Amb. T…

We appreciate @HouseForeignGOP's support. The #PRC’s unreasonable conditions on #APEC2026 undermine a forum built on cooperation & consensus. #Taiwan🇹🇼 drives growth & resilient supply chains. We’ll keep working with the #US🇺🇸 & friends for our equal participation. https://t.co/121F153PWn

We thank @SenateForeign for exposing the #CCP’s false claims. Beijing’s intimidation tactics can’t erase the fact that the #PRC has never governed #Taiwan🇹🇼. Such coercion & disinformation only undermines peace & stability & reveals Beijing’s intent to alter the status quo.

#Taiwan🇹🇼 is providing humanitarian aid to #Gaza with @IMC_Worldwide & @WCKitchen—US$500K for medical supplies & medicines, & US$200K for the “Chef for Gaza Initiative” serving 300K meals daily. Together, we deliver care to some of the most vulnerable, because #TaiwanCanHelp. https://t.co/Vdt5JqifWt

Dep. Min. Wu welcomed Switzerland–Taiwan Parliamentary Friendship Group Co-Chair @udcvr64 to #Taiwan🇹🇼. They discussed deepening Taiwan–#Switzerland🇨🇭 cooperation in trade, industry & innovation to advance mutually beneficial growth & expand collaboration across sectors. https://t.co/XeFwFhxSLP
RT @chia_lung: Glad to meet Philippine Senator @kikopangilinan & Mrs. Pangilinan in Taipei. We exchanged views on advancing smart agricultu…

Deputy Minister Chen welcomed US New England state representatives & senators to #Taiwan🇹🇼. From trade & high-tech to education & energy, we’re strengthening partnerships with #US🇺🇸 states to advance our rock-solid partnership built on freedom & mutual prosperity. https://t.co/vef1aW7xHe
RT @chia_lung: #APEC2025 has concluded in Korea. Grateful to #Taiwan’s Rep. Lin for sharing our innovation & supply chain experience. As AP…
RT @chia_lung: Pleased to welcome North Carolina Governor @JoshStein_ to #Taiwan. We discussed strengthening cooperation across the AI ecos…

Taiwan shines at #APEC #AELM! 🇹🇼 Leader's Rep. Lin Hsin-i completed his mission, promoting #Taiwan's economic resilience, pioneering industries (like chips & AI for healthcare/weather), & enhanced int'l exchange with member economies incl. US/Japan/ROK. https://t.co/emOcG1X422
台湾は、日本の高市早苗首相に感謝致します。私たちも台日関係が一層深まることを期待しています！🇹🇼🤝🇯🇵

🇹🇼Trade Rep. Jen-Ni Yang met with US Dep. Trade Rep. Rick Switzer at #APEC AMM in Gyeongju. They discussed AI's role in trade, the WTO & strengthening economic ties. Both sides expect joint industrial & economic growth as consultations for the trade deal are closing. https://t.co/6qiHBYZASY

Great discussion between Leader's Rep. Hsin-yi Lin & @SecScottBessent at #APEC #AELM on tech policy, talent, & supply chain resilience. Rep. Lin underscored US role in promoting prosperity, reaffirmed the strong partnership & the #TaiwanModel of investment for economic growth.
